PSL 2026 Auction Set for February 11

Jan 26, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

PSL 2026 Auction Set for February 11

The Pakistan Super League (PSL) 2026 auction is officially scheduled for February 11, marking a historic milestone for the league. The 11th season will introduce two new franchises and implement a full auction system, offering teams fresh opportunities to strengthen their squads.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 PSL 2026 Auction Set for February 11
